# Readable HVPS Schematics

Improved schematics with:
- Larger fonts (16pt) for better readability
- Clear component labels with exact values
- High resolution (300 DPI) output
- Professional layout with proper spacing

## Generated Files

1. `hvps_lc_filter_readable.png` - LC filter with exact component values
2. `hvps_12pulse_readable.png` - 12-pulse rectifier topology
3. `hvps_system_overview_readable.png` - Complete system overview
